zh.Pontefract, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾朋特福拉可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Calverley II於大約1442年出生在英國越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親Sir William Calverley19歲，母親Agnes Tempest16歲。他於1457年與Alice Saville在英國越可爾卡爾福利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1506年8月2日在英國蘇格蘭享年65歲，埋葬在英國越可爾卡爾福利。

zh-hans.Pontefract, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾朋特福拉可特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Calverley II于大约1442年出生在英国越可爾卡爾福利时，他的父亲Sir William Calverley19岁，母亲Agnes Tempest16岁。他于1457年与Alice Saville在英国越可爾卡爾福利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1506年8月2日在英国苏格兰享年65岁，埋葬在英国越可爾卡爾福利。

nameMeanings.name: Calverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Calverley II was born about 1442, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Calverley, was 19 and his mother, Agnes Tempest, was 16. He married Alice Saville in 1457, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 2 August 1506, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Calverley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Calverley II est né environ 1442, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Calverley, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Agnes Tempest, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Alice Saville en 1457, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 2 août 1506, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Calverley II um 1442 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Calverley 19 und seine Mutter Agnes Tempest 16. Er hat 1457 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England Alice Saville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 2. August 1506 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Calverley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Calverley II è nato il circa 1442 nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Calverley, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Tempest, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Alice Saville nel 1457, nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 2 agosto 1506, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Calverley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Killed in the field by the Earl of Surre: イギリススコットランド
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Calverley IIが約1442年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir William Calverleyは19歳，母Agnes Tempestは16歳であった。1457年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーでAlice Savilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1506年8月2日にイギリススコットランドで65歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Calverley II(이)가 대략 1442년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Calverley(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Tempest(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1457년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 Alice Saville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1506년 8월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.from 12 April 1488 to 5 July 1489: de 12 de abril de 1488 a 5 de julho de 1489
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Calverley II nasceu aproximadamente 1442, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Calverley, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Tempest, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Saville em 1457, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1506, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Calverley II родился около 1442 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Calverley было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Tempest, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Saville в 1457 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 2 августа 1506 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Alice Saville en 1457, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1506, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
